prompt: Build a Frogger-style arcade game in one HTML file with canvas. The frog starts at the bottom and must reach the top (5 lily pads as safe zones). Middle section: 5 lanes of traffic (cars, trucks, buses) moving left and right at varying speeds — touching a vehicle kills the frog. Upper section: 3 rows of logs and turtles floating on a river — the frog must ride them to cross. Turtles periodically dive underwater (frog falls in water = death). The frog can jump in 4 directions (arrow keys), one grid cell per jump. 3 lives, 60-second timer per attempt. Score: +10 per row advanced, +500 for reaching a lily pad, +1000 bonus for all 5 pads filled. Display: score, lives, timer, lily pads filled (0/5). Colorful retro pixel-art style. Level 2 increases traffic speed.
